results.rendered_html:
sāmi adv.  NIR. 6,23 . gaṇa svarādi zu  P. 1,1,37 . kann mit einem partic. auf ta componirt werden  P. 2,1,27 . 5,4,5 . jugupsane (jugupsite, nindāyām) und ardhe  AK. 3,4,32 (28), 11 .  H. an. 7,41 .  MED. avy. 55 . = asaṃpūrṇa [Page7-0937]  HALĀY. 4,28 .
1〉 vor der Zeit, zu früh: yathā sāmi garbho 'vapadyate  TS. 5,5,1,6 .  ŚAT. BR. 1,3,1,20 . uta sāmyavānyāt d. h. ehe der Vers zu Ende ist 5,14 . sa sāmi nivarteta 2,3,2,14 . tasya sāmi retaḥ pracaskanda 1,7,4,3 . na sāmyudvāsayeta voreilig 2,3,3,4 . yadi sāmyuttiṣṭhet  PAÑCAV. BR. 9,3,1 .
— 2〉 unvollständig, nur zum Theil, nur halb: sāmi prāśnanti sāmi mārjayante  TS. 1,7,1,4 . vilocane sāmi nimīlya  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 257,a,5 . ˚saṃsthita  ŚAT. BR. 9,5,1,25 . ˚cita 7,2,1,18 . 5,2,38 . ˚bhukta  RAGH. 19,16 .  VĀGBH. 1,12,52 . ˚kṛta, ˚pīta Schol. zu  P. 2,1,27 . 5,4,5 . ˚nīlotpalaśyāma  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 213,b,5 v. u. 
— Vgl. a˚, pra˚.

results.rendered_html:
sāmi ind.
1 Half; i. e. unfinished; abhivīkṣya sāmikṛtamaṃḍanaṃ yatīḥ kararuddhanīvigaladaṃśukāḥ striyaḥ  Śi. 13. 31 ,  R. 19. 16. 
2 Blamable, vile, contemptible. [Cf. L. semi; Gr. hemi].
